title: Glow Ores: without opifine
description: It's Make Ores Glowing to notice in dark cave without optifine only with Vanilla Minecraft
body:
This Minecraft java Edition Resource pack make a minecraft ores glowing on a dark,
For Notic in caves and it's work with vanilla version without any bugs!
and it's add outline for ores to make more diffrent from other block.
